heading: Extension of protection of an international registration to the United States under the Madrid Protocol
label: 1141e Extension of protection of an international registration to the United States under the Madrid Protocol

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to the provisions of , the holder of an international registration shall be entitled to the benefits of extension of protection of that international registration to the United States to the extent necessary to give effect to any provision of the Madrid Protocol.section 1141h of this title

children.heading: If the United States is office of origin
children.label: b If the United States is office of origin
children.text: Where the United States Patent and Trademark Office is the office of origin for a trademark application or registration, any international registration based on such application or registration cannot be used to obtain the benefits of the Madrid Protocol in the United States.
